Sage Bot Item Code: RI3


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Star of the Seas Ring

Strengthens the wearer based on what is happening on the battlefield. Activates once per battle. Summoned minions don’t count.
- When the enemy has an advantage of 1 unit, the unit deals an extra 17000 damage in 3 attacks and restores 40000 of its health over 4 sec.
- When the enemy has an advantage of 2 units, the unit becomes invulnerable for 1,6 sec and deals 40000 damage across a certain area.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
